title: Y2K Nightlife Contact Sheet Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Y2k Nightlife Contact Sheet Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-realistic vertical disposable-camera contact sheet collage built around same adult woman with soft IG-baddie clean-girl makeup and ultra-long chestnut-brown layered blowout hair, elegant black-and-white halter dress with deep plunging neckline, open-side silhouette, corset-inspired waist, and sleek nightlife styling, and two candid panels from a glamorous night out: luxury rooftop lounge with sparkling city lights, then flash-lit party corridor with spontaneous direct eye contact. Subject: same adult woman with soft IG-baddie clean-girl makeup and ultra-long chestnut-brown layered blowout hair appears consistently across every frame with the same face, hair, makeup, glamorous nightlife energy, and candid documentary continuity. Scene: two candid panels from a glamorous night out: luxury rooftop lounge with sparkling city lights, then flash-lit party corridor with spontaneous direct eye contact unfolds during a glamorous night out with luxury party atmosphere, city lights, flash moments, and nostalgic early-2000s nightlife memory. Composition: Fixed tall smartphone-friendly contact sheet with exactly two stacked photo panels, authentic black film-strip borders, same woman in both frames, and candid disposable-camera framing. Signature Elements: The template identity is the same woman repeated through two candid nightlife photo panels, with Y2K makeup, chestnut blowout hair, glamorous party outfit, flash texture, and black film-strip borders. Style: Authentic Y2K nightlife aesthetic, early-2000s digital camera flash photography, luxury party-girl energy, candid documentary storytelling, nostalgic nightlife memories, and disposable-camera texture. Color Palette: Fixed nightlife palette with black film-strip borders, flash-lit skin, glossy pink makeup, chestnut hair shine, black-and-white wardrobe contrast, warm lounge highlights, and city-night sparkle. Lighting: Direct nightlife flash mixed with warm ambient party light, sparkling city bokeh, glossy makeup highlights, and slight candid exposure imperfections. Camera: Disposable-camera contact sheet look, two stacked panels, flash-forward candid framing, tall vertical layout, and authentic film-strip border spacing. Materials: elegant black-and-white halter dress with deep plunging neckline, open-side silhouette, corset-inspired waist, and sleek nightlife styling stays tactile with hair shine, glass skin highlights, glossy lips, fabric sheen, film grain, black borders, and nightlife surface reflections. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
